title: 🚀 We're Looking for Beta Testers – AI-Powered Trading Analysis Platform
author: Usual-Cheesecake-479
selftext:
Hey there!

I'm working on a new platform that uses **artificial intelligence** to generate trading ideas based on **real-time charts**, **technical indicators**, and **market behavior**.

We're currently in the **beta testing phase** and looking for a few passionate traders to try it out and give us honest feedback.

👉 If you're into **crypto, stocks, or forex**, and love testing new tools, we'd love to have you on board!

🎁 **What you get:**

* Early access to the platform
* AI-generated trading ideas
* 50% discount with the code **BETATEST50 (No credit card required - 7 Day Free Trial)**
* Direct contact with the team for feedback

If you give us **realistic and detailed feedback**, you'll receive **lifetime free access** to the platform!

Drop a comment, send me a DM, or sign up here: [https://quantify-ai.co](https://quantify-ai.co/)  
Thanks for your support! 🙌
